rows.source_ref: "How to exit losing trades", ForexFactory thread #376064 (20 posts, ~single page), various handles (ibpo, GoodOlJoe, Forexnuts, meng88, etc.), n.d., https://www.forexfactory.com/thread/376064-how-to-exit-losing-trades
rows.concept: Generic trader-psychology chatter on cutting losses (use a stop loss, close with a market order, know your exit before entry, trail stops) with no defined entry edge or parameterized system.
rows.eligibility_reason: Opinion thread on exit discipline only; no entry edge, no complete deterministic rule set or params to ever implement.
rows.notes: Isolated fragments (20-35 pip SL, 1:1.5 R:R, 5-pip SL, trailing stops) are exit-management platitudes, not a testable strategy; nothing mechanizable.
